title: Germany Business/Trade Registration (Gewerbeanmeldung, GewA 1) — § 14 GewO / § 55c GewO
description: Register the start of a commercial trade (Gewerbe) in Germany using the bundeseinheitlich (nationally standardized) 'Gewerbe-Anmeldung' form GewA 1, filed with the locally competent Gewerbeamt/Ordnungsamt (trade office) of the municipality where the business premises (Betriebsstätte) is located. The form's layout is prescribed nationwide by the Gewerbeanzeigeverordnung (GewAnzV, a federal ordinance under the Gewerbeordnung/GewO) so every municipality's edition collects the same field set, even though intake, channel (paper, in person, or a municipal online form), and fees are set locally. This is the closest German analogue to sg/acra/sole-proprietorship-registration and fr/inpi/micro-entrepreneur-activity-declaration: it models a natural person registering as a sole trader (Einzelunternehmer), as one managing partner of an unregistered civil-law partnership (GbR — each managing partner files their own copy of this form), or as the legal representative of an already-registered legal entity/registered partnership (e.g. GmbH, OHG) filing on the entity's behalf. Full incorporation of a GmbH or AG itself (drafting the Gesellschaftsvertrag/Satzung and the Handelsregister entry) requires notarial certification under the Beurkundungsgesetz and is out of scope — this schema begins after any such entity already exists (or is being formed as a sole proprietorship/GbR, which needs no notary), at the point of registering the resulting trade with the Gewerbeamt, which closes the Business Formation vertical's last open jurisdiction candidate (DE).

authority.name: Gewerbeamt/Ordnungsamt (the locally competent municipal trade office, per § 14 GewO), using the nationally standardized form prescribed by the Gewerbeanzeigeverordnung under the Bundesministerium für Wirtschaft und Klimaschutz's Gewerbeordnung framework

source.documentRef: GewA 1 — 'Gewerbe-Anmeldung nach § 14 GewO oder § 55c GewO', bundeseinheitlicher Vordruck (Freie und Hansestadt Hamburg's official bilingual German/English edition; content and field order cross-checked against the Freistaat Sachsen (formularservice-sachsen.de), Freistaat Bayern (stmwi.bayern.de) editions of the same nationally standardized form, and the City of Düsseldorf Ordnungsamt's field-by-field guidance 'Anleitung zur Gewerbeanmeldung')

verification.notes: Authored from the genuine fillable-AcroForm GewA 1 PDFs published by three separate Länder/municipalities (Hamburg's own bilingual German/English edition, Sachsen's formularservice edition, and Bayern's state-ministry edition), extracted with pdfjs-dist's getTextContent()/getAnnotations() (the same technique used for fr/inpi/micro-entrepreneur-activity-declaration). All three editions carry the same field content in the same numbered order (1 through 33, with gaps at 25 and 27 reserved for form-internal headings rather than data fields), confirming the Gewerbeanzeigeverordnung's nationwide standardization claim rather than relying on a single municipality's copy. Field-level requiredness/conditional-visibility guidance (which fields sole traders vs. partnerships vs. legal entities complete, which fields are relevant only for takeovers/relocations, which are craft-business- or foreign-national-only) was corroborated against the City of Düsseldorf Ordnungsamt's own official 4-page 'Anleitung zur Gewerbeanmeldung' (field-by-field completion guide), not inferred from the form layout alone. Registration cost (municipality-set, roughly EUR 10-65, not modelled as a fixed documents[].amount) and the 'promptly, at the latest within about a week of starting the activity' filing-deadline norm under § 14 GewO were cross-checked across independent secondary explainer sources (gewerbeanmeldung.de, taxfix.de, gruenderplattform.de) since no single primary source states both a numeric fee and deadline uniformly (fee is legally left to each municipality's Kostensatzung). No live municipal online-Gewerbeanmeldung portal was submitted to end-to-end for this version (channel and screen layout vary per municipality, with many still paper/in-person only), so status remains 'draft', not 'verified'; the underlying GewA 1 field set itself is federally uniform regardless of channel.

fields.name: applicantType
fields.label: Who is registering?
fields.description: Sole traders (Einzelunternehmer) leave the register-entry fields (1-2 on the source form) blank. A GbR (unregistered civil-law partnership) partner notes 'GbR' plus the other partners' names in the company-name field instead of a register entry; each managing partner of a GbR files a separate copy of this form for the same business. A registered legal entity/partnership (e.g. GmbH, OHG) already entered — or in the process of being entered ('i.G.') — in the Handels-, Genossenschafts-, or Vereinsregister provides its registered name, legal form, and register entry.
fields.sourceRef: Fields 1-2, 'Im Handels-, Genossenschafts- oder Vereinsregister eingetragener Name mit Rechtsform'; Düsseldorf Ordnungsamt Anleitung — 'Einzelunternehmen: Lassen Sie Feld 1 und 2 leer. GbR: ... tragen alle Gesellschafter ein.'

fields.name: registeredCompanyName
fields.label: Registered name with legal form
fields.description: For a GbR: the partnership's working name, marked 'GbR'. For a registered legal entity not yet entered in the register, append 'i. G.' (in Gründung) and attach a notarised copy of the Gesellschaftsvertrag/Satzung.
fields.sourceRef: Field 1 — 'Name entered in the Commercial Register, Register of Co-operatives or Register of Associations citing legal structure (if necessary in case of GbR: details of the other shareholders)'

fields.name: registerEntryLocationAndNumber
fields.label: Place and number of register entry
fields.description: Where the entity is already entered in the Handels-, Genossenschafts-, or Vereinsregister, the register court/location and entry number. Left blank for an entity still 'i. G.' (not yet entered).
fields.sourceRef: Field 2 — 'Place and no. of entry in register'

fields.name: gbrPartnerNames
fields.label: Other managing partners (GbR)
fields.description: Full names of the GbR's other managing partners. Each managing partner separately files their own copy of this form for the same business.
fields.sourceRef: Field 1 note; Düsseldorf Ordnungsamt Anleitung — 'Bei Anmeldung einer Personengesellschaft z. B. einer GbR muss jeder Gesellschafter eine eigene Gewerbeanmeldung ... vornehmen.'

fields.name: tradeName
fields.label: Business/trade designation (Geschäftsbezeichnung), if any
fields.description: An optional trading name distinct from the registrant's own or the registered legal name, e.g. a shopfront or brand name.
fields.sourceRef: Field 3 — 'Geschäftsbezeichnung'; Düsseldorf Ordnungsamt Anleitung — 'Liegt eine Geschäftsbezeichnung vor, kann diese hier angegeben werden.'

fields.name: familyName
fields.label: Surname
fields.description: For a registered legal entity, the surname of its legal representative (field 4-11 apply to the representative, not the entity itself), except for a domestic AG.
fields.sourceRef: Field 3 — 'Surname'

fields.name: givenNames
fields.label: Given names
fields.sourceRef: Field 4 — 'Given names'

fields.name: birthName
fields.label: Name at birth (if different from surname)
fields.sourceRef: Field 5 — 'Name at birth (if different from surname)'

fields.name: sex
fields.label: Sex
fields.description: The source form offers only a binary male/female (männlich/weiblich) checkbox; this schema reflects that as published, not as a design choice.
fields.sourceRef: Field 4a — 'Gender — male / female'

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.sourceRef: Field 6 — 'Date of birth'

fields.name: placeOfBirth
fields.label: Place of birth
fields.sourceRef: Field 7 — 'Place and country of birth'

fields.name: countryOfBirth
fields.label: Country of birth
fields.sourceRef: Field 7 — 'Place and country of birth'

fields.name: isGermanNational
fields.label: German national?
fields.sourceRef: Field 8 — 'Nationality(ies) — German / other'

fields.name: otherNationality
fields.label: Nationality, if not German
fields.sourceRef: Field 8 — 'Nationality(ies) — German / other:'

fields.name: homeAddressStreet
fields.label: Home address — street
fields.sourceRef: Field 9 — 'Residential address (street, house no., postcode, place)'

fields.name: homeAddressHouseNumber
fields.label: Home address — house number
fields.sourceRef: Field 9 — 'Residential address'

fields.name: homeAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Home address — postcode
fields.description: German postcodes (Postleitzahl) are 5 digits.
fields.sourceRef: Field 9 — 'Residential address'

fields.name: homeAddressCity
fields.label: Home address — place
fields.sourceRef: Field 9 — 'Residential address'

fields.name: homePhoneNumber
fields.label: Home telephone number
fields.sourceRef: Field 9 — 'Tel.no.'

fields.name: homeFaxNumber
fields.label: Home fax number
fields.sourceRef: Field 9 — 'Fax.no'

fields.name: homeEmailOrWebsite
fields.label: Email/web (voluntary)
fields.sourceRef: Field 9 — 'optional: Email/web'

fields.name: numberOfManagingPartnersOrRepresentatives
fields.label: Number of managing partners / legal representatives
fields.description: Sole traders and registered sole merchants (eingetragene Kaufleute) leave this blank. Otherwise the number of managing partners (Personengesellschaft) or legal representatives (juristische Person).
fields.sourceRef: Field 10 — 'Number of managing partners (only in case of non-incorporated companies) / Number of legal representatives (only in case of legal persons)'; Düsseldorf Ordnungsamt Anleitung — 'Einzelunternehmen und eingetragene Kaufleute lassen dieses Feld leer.'

fields.name: isDomesticStockCorporationBranchOrDependentBranch
fields.label: Is this a domestic stock corporation (AG), branch office, or dependent branch office?
fields.description: Gates whether a separately named authorised representative/manager must be given, distinct from the legal representative already named above.
fields.sourceRef: Field 11 — 'Persons/managers authorised as representatives (only in case of domestic AGs, branches and dependent branches)'

fields.name: authorizedRepresentativeName
fields.label: Authorised representative / manager — name
fields.sourceRef: Field 11 — 'Persons/managers authorised as representatives' — surname/given names

fields.name: premisesStreet
fields.label: Business premises — street
fields.sourceRef: Field 12 — 'Permanent establishment — street, house-no., postcode, place'

fields.name: premisesHouseNumber
fields.label: Business premises — house number
fields.sourceRef: Field 12 — 'Permanent establishment'

fields.name: premisesPostalCode
fields.label: Business premises — postcode
fields.sourceRef: Field 12 — 'Permanent establishment'

fields.name: premisesCity
fields.label: Business premises — place
fields.sourceRef: Field 12 — 'Permanent establishment'

fields.name: premisesPhoneNumber
fields.label: Business premises — telephone number
fields.sourceRef: Field 12 — 'Tel.no.'

fields.name: premisesFaxNumber
fields.label: Business premises — fax number
fields.sourceRef: Field 12 — 'Fax.no'

fields.name: premisesEmailOrWebsite
fields.label: Business premises — email/web (voluntary)
fields.sourceRef: Field 12 — 'optional: Email/web'

fields.name: registrationScope
fields.label: This registration applies to
fields.description: Whether the premises above is the business's principal establishment, a branch (Zweigniederlassung), or a dependent branch office (unselbständige Zweigstelle) of a principal establishment registered elsewhere.
fields.sourceRef: Field 20 — 'The registration applies to — a principal establishment / a branch / a dependent branch'

fields.name: principalEstablishmentStreet
fields.label: Principal establishment — street
fields.description: Only completed if the premises being registered is merely a branch or dependent branch office of a principal establishment located elsewhere.
fields.sourceRef: Field 13 — 'Principal establishment (if permanent establishment is merely branch) — street, house-no., postcode, place'

fields.name: principalEstablishmentHouseNumber
fields.label: Principal establishment — house number
fields.sourceRef: Field 13 — 'Principal establishment'

fields.name: principalEstablishmentPostalCode
fields.label: Principal establishment — postcode
fields.sourceRef: Field 13 — 'Principal establishment'

fields.name: principalEstablishmentCity
fields.label: Principal establishment — place
fields.sourceRef: Field 13 — 'Principal establishment'

fields.name: isVendingMachineBusiness
fields.label: Is this also a vending-machine-installation business (Automatenaufstellungsgewerbe)?
fields.sourceRef: Field 21 — 'a business installing vending machines'

fields.name: isItinerantTrade
fields.label: Is this also an itinerant trade (Reisegewerbe)?
fields.description: A door-to-door/travelling trade conducted without a fixed commercial establishment, separately licensed under § 55c GewO. This field only flags the checkbox on the GewA 1 form; a Reisegewerbekarte application itself is a separate process out of scope here.
fields.sourceRef: Field 22 — 'an itinerant trader'

fields.name: activityDescription
fields.label: Registered activity
fields.description: A precise description of the activity, e.g. 'Großhandel mit Elektrowaren' (wholesale of electrical goods) — generic phrasing like 'trade in goods of all kinds' is rejected in practice. If multiple activities are conducted, the main one should be indicated.
fields.sourceRef: Field 15 — 'Registered activity — if necessary use extra sheet (give precise description ...; in case of several activities, please underline main activity)'

fields.name: isSecondaryOccupation
fields.label: Is the activity (initially) being run as a sideline (Nebenerwerb)?
fields.description: Collected for statistical purposes; it is not itself a legal eligibility gate.
fields.sourceRef: Field 16 — 'Is the business (initially) being run as a sideline?'; Düsseldorf Ordnungsamt Anleitung — 'Diese Angabe dient nur statistischen Zwecken.'

fields.name: activityStartDate
fields.label: Date of commencement of registered activity
fields.sourceRef: Field 17 — 'Date of commencement of registered activity'

fields.name: businessType
fields.label: Type of business registered
fields.description: Determines assignment to the Industrie- und Handelskammer (IHK) or Handwerkskammer (HWK) for statutory chamber membership.
fields.sourceRef: Field 18 — 'Type of business registered — Industry / Crafts / Trade / Other'; Düsseldorf Ordnungsamt Anleitung — 'Dieses Feld dient dazu, Ihr Gewerbe der IHK bzw. HWK zuzuordnen.'

fields.name: fullTimeEmployeeCountAtStart
fields.label: Full-time employees at commencement (excluding owner)
fields.description: Enter 0 if none.
fields.sourceRef: Field 19 — 'Number of persons active when business activity commenced (excluding owner) — Full-time'

fields.name: partTimeEmployeeCountAtStart
fields.label: Part-time employees at commencement (excluding owner)
fields.description: Enter 0 if none.
fields.sourceRef: Field 19 — 'Number of persons active when business activity commenced (excluding owner) — Part-time'

fields.name: filingCategory
fields.label: Reason for registration — category
fields.sourceRef: Fields 23-24 — 'Reason — New establishment / Take-over'

fields.name: newEstablishmentReason
fields.label: New establishment — reason
fields.sourceRef: Field 23 — 'New start-up / Re-opening following relocation from a different district of registration'

fields.name: takeoverReason
fields.label: Takeover — reason
fields.sourceRef: Field 24 — 'Change of legal structure / Founding of business pursuant to the Reorganisation Act (e.g. merger, split) / Admission of partner / Inheritance/purchase/lease'

fields.name: formerOperatorOrCompanyName
fields.label: Name of former operator or former business name
fields.description: Not relevant for a brand-new start-up at a brand-new location.
fields.sourceRef: Field 26 — 'Name of former operator or former business name'; Düsseldorf Ordnungsamt Anleitung — '26-27 ... nur relevant, wenn es sich bei dem anzumeldenden Gewerbe nicht um eine Neugründung handelt.'

fields.name: formerEstablishmentStreet
fields.label: Former establishment — street
fields.description: The prior address: the old premises' address on relocation, or the taken-over business's address on a takeover.
fields.sourceRef: Field 14 — 'Former permanent establishment — street, house-no., postcode, place'

fields.name: formerEstablishmentHouseNumber
fields.label: Former establishment — house number
fields.sourceRef: Field 14 — 'Former permanent establishment'

fields.name: formerEstablishmentPostalCode
fields.label: Former establishment — postcode
fields.sourceRef: Field 14 — 'Former permanent establishment'

fields.name: formerEstablishmentCity
fields.label: Former establishment — place
fields.sourceRef: Field 14 — 'Former permanent establishment'

fields.name: hasBusinessPermit
fields.label: Does a licence/permit exist for this activity?
fields.description: Some activities (e.g. restaurants under § 2 GastG, certain financial or health-adjacent trades) require a specific permit before the trade may lawfully begin; the Gewerbeanmeldung itself is only a notification, not that permit.
fields.sourceRef: Field 28 — 'Does a licence/permit exist? If so, date of issue and issuing authority'

fields.name: businessPermitIssueDateAndAuthority
fields.label: Permit — issue date and issuing authority
fields.sourceRef: Field 28 — 'If so, date of issue and issuing authority'

fields.name: hasCraftsRollCard
fields.label: Does a Handwerkskarte (crafts-roll card) exist?
fields.description: Only relevant for craft businesses (Handwerksbetriebe), which must be entered in the Handwerksrolle maintained by the competent Handwerkskammer before starting an 'essential' (zulassungspflichtig) craft.
fields.sourceRef: Field 29 — '[Only for craft-based firms] Does a craft card exist? If so, date of issue and name of chamber of crafts'

fields.name: craftsCardIssueDateAndChamber
fields.label: Crafts-roll card — issue date and chamber of crafts
fields.sourceRef: Field 29 — 'If so, date of issue and name of chamber of crafts'

fields.name: hasResidencePermit
fields.label: Does a residence permit (Aufenthaltsgenehmigung) exist?
fields.description: Only asked of non-German-national applicants; a residence/settlement permit permitting self-employed activity is a precondition for a non-EU national's trade registration.
fields.sourceRef: Field 30 — 'Does a residence permit exist? If so, date of issue and issuing authority'

fields.name: residencePermitIssueDateAndAuthority
fields.label: Residence permit — issue date and issuing authority
fields.sourceRef: Field 30 — 'If so, date of issue and issuing authority'

fields.name: residencePermitHasConditions
fields.label: Is the residence permit subject to a condition or restriction?
fields.description: Does not apply to holders of an unconditional settlement permit (Niederlassungserlaubnis).
fields.sourceRef: Field 31 — 'Is the residence permit subject to a condition or restriction? — does not apply to holders of a settlement permit'

fields.name: residencePermitConditionsDetail
fields.label: Residence permit — conditions or restrictions
fields.sourceRef: Field 31 — 'If yes, it contains the following conditions or restrictions'

fields.name: declarationDate
fields.label: Date of declaration / signature
fields.description: The date the applicant (or authorised representative) signs the completed form immediately before submission to the Gewerbeamt.
fields.sourceRef: Fields 32-33 — 'Date' / 'Signature'

documents.label: Copy of identity card or passport
documents.sourceRef: Standard Gewerbeamt intake requirement cross-checked across multiple municipal Gewerbeanmeldung guidance pages (e.g. gewerbeanmeldung.de, taxfix.de); not itself printed as a checklist line on the GewA 1 form.

documents.label: Commercial/co-operative/association register extract
documents.sourceRef: Field 2 context — 'Place and no. of entry in register'; secondary sourcing on registration document checklists

documents.label: Handwerksrolle entry extract or Handwerkskarte
documents.sourceRef: Field 29 — '[Only for craft-based firms] Does a craft card exist?'

documents.label: Registration fee
documents.sourceRef: Fee is set by each municipality's own Kostensatzung (roughly EUR 10-65), not published on the GewA 1 form itself; cross-checked across independent secondary explainer sources (gewerbeanmeldung.de, taxfix.de, gruenderplattform.de).
